name: Guangdong Wanlima Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Wanlima Industry Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and retails leather products in the People's Republic of China. It offers men and women shoes, handbags, suitcases wallets, belts, gloves, and other products in the People's Republic of China. The company markets its products under the WANLIMA, Saint Jack, OILILY, and COOME brands. It also operates flagship stores, store shops, counters, and other terminal stores. Guangdong Wanlima Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
